name: Fostis Mirk
location: Jaunty Horn (encountered); traveling between Dreg and Lankshorn
description: A merchant from Dreg with a persistent smell of fishmonger. Six generations of his family have worked the fish trade. He sells fish bullion and was traveling to Lankshorn for the breggle festival when encountered.
notes: From Dreg; family have been fishmongers for six generations.
Traveling to Lankshorn for the Hlerribuck breggle festival.
Warned Jack about Hogbeard, a dangerous zealot in Dreg.
Mentioned Shantywood Isle as a haunt for miscreants and shady figures.
